creator: dave.evans55@googlemail.com
text:
Almost any port I choose is failing to build with a 
make: don't know how to make ask-license  error.

I really don't know why I seem to be the only one afflicted by
this problem.

This is the first time I have tried to compile any ports since
last May.  Since then the licenses framework has been installed.

Ports cvsupped as of a couple of days ago.

I have looked at bsd.licenses.mk, but I don't really understand
it.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/devel/pcre
make

make -DDISABLE_LICENSES
also gets the same error
